name: Claude in repo
description: Launch Claude Code inside a repository under ~/repos

preferences.name: Repositories directory
preferences.description: Directory containing your repositories. List several comma-separated to search multiple roots (e.g. ~/work, ~/personal).

preferences.name: Terminal
preferences.description: Terminal emulator used to open Claude Code (e.g. alacritty, kitty, gnome-terminal, konsole, wezterm). Defaults to the system default terminal.
